assessment.note: He says the work landed but was heavier than he let on, signalling some hidden drag and muted strain rather than clean momentum.

new_queue.label: Heavier than sounded
new_queue.name: When you say 'heavier' — what was adding the weight?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific source of the load Lin just named.

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
new_queue.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Late nights driver
new_queue.name: What’s been driving the late nights lately?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether the pace is coming from temporary push, rework, or hidden load.

new_queue.label: What’s on your mind
new_queue.name: What’s been most on your mind at work lately?
new_queue.description: Safe opener that lets Lin set context before any concern is introduced.

new_queue.label: What’s still on you
new_queue.name: What work is still sitting on your plate that you expected to hand off by now?
new_queue.description: Checks whether Lin is carrying ownership that could be distributed.

new_queue.label: Delegation boundary
new_queue.name: What do you think only you should keep owning right now?
new_queue.description: Gets Lin to name the boundary between essential ownership and delegable work.

new_queue.label: Hand-off friction
new_queue.name: What makes it hard to hand more of this off?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether the bottleneck is trust, process, or team capability.

new_queue.label: Load relief
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks lighter for you?
new_queue.description: Finds one concrete change that would reduce strain without opening a new agenda.
